ordinanceLabel: Tulelake Zoning Ordinance Title 17 (July 2025) | Title 15 (Buildings & Construction, not published online) | 2025 CBSC in effect
buildingDept: City of Tulelake City Hall (staff-handled, no dedicated building dept)
buildingDeptAddress: 591 Main Street / P.O. Box 847, Tulelake, CA 96134
buildingDeptHours: Contact City Hall for current hours
fireAgencyNote: Independent volunteer FD (~25 personnel, 2 stations). ISO PPC 5/5Y (2023). LRA — NOT a CAL FIRE unit.
portalNote: No online permit portal. Applications submitted in person or by mail to City Hall.
gasUtility: None — no piped natural gas in Tulelake; propane/LP gas is standard fuel
waterUtility: City of Tulelake Public Works (municipal water system)
sewerUtility: City of Tulelake Public Works (municipal sewer system)
healthAuthorityNote: County-level health authority for food establishments and other health permits
airDistrict: North Coast Unified Air Quality Management District (NCUAQMD)
muniCodeScrapeNote: City-hosted PDFs. Zoning Ordinance (Title 17) available as PDF. Title 15 (Buildings & Construction) referenced but NOT published online — contact City Hall for copy.
fhszNote: No portion of Tulelake is in High or Very High FHSZ per 2025 General Plan Safety Element. Chapter 7A WUI requirements do not apply inside city limits.
wuiNote: City is not Wildland Urban Interface (confirmed: 2025 General Plan Safety Element).
cityVsCountyPermits: City Hall staff handle all building permits with guidance from City Building Inspector Mike Britton. There is no standalone building department. No county delegation.
localAmendmentContent: Title 15 not published online — local amendments (if any) are unverified. State code governs by default.
